title: NFT Collection Analytics
description: Holder count, top holders, transfer velocity, and ownership concentration for any ERC-721 collection — build analytics dashboards without a marketplace API.
useCase: Build an NFT collection insights page showing unique holder count, top 10 whale holders, daily transfer volume, and holder concentration — all from on-chain data.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only — eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
keyParams.collectionContract: NFT collection contract address to analyze
keyParams.pageSize: Number of holders per page — max 100
